title: Property Consultant - K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
company: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners:
K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners!
